subject: Docker compose fails: postgres container exits immediately
description: Following the self-host guide but the postgres container keeps exiting with code 1 on docker compose up.

subject: OAuth setup with GitHub redirects to error page
description: Configured GitHub OAuth in the env file but the callback returns redirect_uri mismatch.

subject: Pocket import fails halfway through
description: Importing my Pocket export and it stops around 400 bookmarks with no error shown.

subject: Refund request for accidental annual upgrade
description: I clicked annual by mistake and would like a refund back to monthly.

subject: Feature request: keyboard shortcuts for archiving
description: Would love single-key shortcuts to archive and tag bookmarks faster.

subject: Full-text search returns no results after reindex
description: After upgrading, the search box returns nothing even for titles I know exist.

subject: Self-host TLS cert renewal not picked up
description: Renewed my Lets Encrypt cert but the container still serves the old expired one.

subject: Billing: charged twice for December
description: I see two Stripe charges for the same December subscription period.

subject: Browser extension not saving from Firefox
description: The save button in the extension spins forever on Firefox 122.

subject: How do I migrate the database to a new host?
description: Moving my self-hosted instance to a new server, what is the safe way to move the postgres volume?

subject: Instapaper import drops tags
description: My imported items came in but none of the original tags carried over.

subject: OAuth with Google: invalid_client error
description: Set up Google OAuth on my self-host and getting invalid_client on sign in.

subject: Feature request: bulk export to JSON
description: Please add a one-click export of all bookmarks as JSON for backups.

subject: Dark mode toggle resets on reload
description: I switch to dark mode but it reverts to light every time I refresh the page.

subject: Refund: cancelled but still billed
description: I cancelled before renewal but was charged anyway, requesting a refund.

subject: Self-host: 502 from reverse proxy under load
description: Behind nginx my instance throws 502 when I open many bookmarks at once.

subject: Mobile web layout broken on iPhone
description: The bookmark list overlaps the header on Safari iOS 17.

subject: Chrome extension save fails with auth token expired
description: Extension says token expired and wont reconnect to my self-hosted instance.

subject: How to set up automated backups for self-host?
description: Looking for a recommended cron approach to back up the postgres data nightly.

subject: Feature request: RSS feed per tag
description: It would be great to subscribe to an RSS feed filtered by a specific tag.

subject: Import from Raindrop.io: duplicate entries
description: After importing my Raindrop export every bookmark appears twice.

subject: Bug: archived items reappear after sync
description: Items I archive on desktop come back as unread on my phone after a sync.

subject: Billing: how to switch from annual back to monthly
description: I want to downgrade from the annual plan to monthly at renewal, how do I do that?

subject: Self-host upgrade to v4 fails on migration step
description: Running the v4 upgrade and the schema migration halts with a constraint error.
